problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
